# 🚖 Uber Ride Analytics Dashboard

An interactive Power BI dashboard designed to analyze Uber ride bookings, revenue trends, vehicle performance, and operational insights through dynamic visualizations and business intelligence techniques.

---

## 📊 Dashboard Features

* Interactive homepage with navigation
* Vehicle-wise filtering and analysis
* Monthly revenue trends
* Monthly booking analysis
* Revenue generated by vehicle categories
* Top pickup and drop locations
* Ride status distribution analysis
* KPI cards for operational insights
* Interactive charts and slicers

---

## 📈 Key Insights

* Auto and Bike categories generated comparatively higher revenue than premium vehicle types.
* Ride bookings remained stable across most months with noticeable fluctuations during peak periods.
* Certain pickup and drop locations consistently recorded higher ride demand.
* Completed rides represented the majority of total bookings, while cancelled and incomplete rides highlighted operational inefficiencies.
* Revenue analysis helped identify high-performing vehicle categories and monthly trends.

---

## 🛠️ Technologies Used

* Power BI
* DAX
* Power Query
* Data Visualization
* Dashboard Design

---
